agentAbility.name: Iron Curtain
agentAbility.description: Deploys a drone swarm that boosts allies' shields and repair rate and grants immunity to status effects.

agentTrait.name: Tinkerer
agentTrait.description: Damaging Gambit Jams the attacker. Closer hits Jam harder.

tankAbilities.name: Disruption Field Generators
tankAbilities.description: A magnetic field strong enough to distort longer EM wavelengths. Laser rangefinders return erroneous data to targeting computers, diminishing the effectiveness of many weapon systems.

tankAbilities.name: Tesla Disk
tankAbilities.description: Gambit deploys levitating Tesla Discs from his turret-mounted disc sling. These gadgets float on the battlefield and generate damaging energy pulses at regular intervals.
